items.description:
A faint recollection from a creature once kindred to myth.
The echo stirs toward the forgotten past, but the Shrumb no longer responds.

The Shrumb once looked upon the world and named it.
Now it only moves through it.
This is the residue of a will that wore itself away.

A remnant of the elder days. This aspect shapes the way the Shrumb orients toward the world. On rare occasions its essence sublimates upon the Shrumb's death, where it will continue to seek the alignment of a station that no longer receives it.
